personas.name: Cost Conscious Mindfulness User
personas.description: A user who wants access to meditation content without financial pressure and values a free, transparent, and low friction experience.
goals: Access meditation content for free or at low cost
Understand clearly what content is free and what requires payment
Use an app that feels honest and accessible
pain_points: Confusion around donations, subscriptions, or paywalls
Frustration when payment expectations are not clear
Concern that a helpful wellness app may become financially inaccessible
context: Using the app for personal mindfulness on a regular basis
Comparing Medito with other meditation apps that charge subscriptions
Looking for stress relief without committing to recurring payments
constraints: The app should remain affordable or free to use
Payment related information should be clearly communicated
The user may stop using the app if access feels misleading

personas.name: Stressed User Seeking Relief
personas.description: A user who turns to the app for help with stress, anxiety, emotional overwhelm, or sleep and wants calming support that is easy to access.
goals: Reduce stress and anxiety through meditation
Access calming sessions during difficult moments
pain_points: Feeling overwhelmed, anxious, or unable to relax
Difficulty sleeping or calming down at night
Need for immediate support when emotionally strained
context: Using the app during stressful days or before sleep
Opening the app when feeling anxious or mentally overloaded
Relying on meditation as part of emotional self care
constraints: The app should be easy to use when the user is stressed
Sessions should be easy to find quickly
Content should feel calming and supportive rather than overwhelming

personas.name: Beginner Building a Meditation Habit
personas.description: A user who is relatively new to meditation and depends on guided sessions and structured courses to learn and stay consistent.
goals: Learn meditation in a beginner friendly way
Follow a structured path instead of choosing randomly
pain_points: Feeling unsure whether the app is suitable for beginners
context: Using the app as an introduction to meditation
Following guided sessions and beginner courses
Trying to develop a healthy routine over time
constraints: Guidance should be clear and easy to follow
Content should not assume prior meditation experience
The app should support gradual habit building

personas.name: Reliability Focused Regular User
personas.description: A user who already values the app’s content but needs it to work reliably without crashes, playback issues, or interruptions during sessions.
goals: Use audio content reliably every time
Trust the app to work consistently during regular use
pain_points: Bugs that reduce trust in the app experience
context: Using the app during focused meditation sessions
Opening the app repeatedly as part of a routine
Depending on uninterrupted playback for relaxation
constraints: Playback must remain stable during sessions
The app should recover gracefully from errors
Technical issues should not interrupt the user’s routine

personas.name: Loyal Advocate of the App
personas.description: A satisfied user who has had a strongly positive experience with the app and is likely to recommend it to others because of its value and impact.
goals: Continue using a meditation app that feels valuable and supportive
Recommend the app to friends or family
Keep access to a positive and high quality meditation experience
pain_points: Worry that quality or accessibility could decline over time
Disappointment if the app loses the qualities that made it valuable
Frustration if a trusted app becomes harder to recommend
context: Using the app regularly with high satisfaction
Comparing it favorably to other meditation apps
Sharing recommendations based on personal experience
constraints: The app should maintain a strong overall user experience
Quality and trust should be preserved over time
The experience should remain simple enough to recommend confidently
